---
title: "John Robson Scarlett"
---

## John Robson Scarlett

**Dates:** (1848-1902)

### Description

autograph hunter and accountant

### Biography

He extracted autographs from Hardy and Swinburne using the same technique.[[[otherbook:1033]<i>Collected Letters of Thomas Hardy</i>], VII, 105 and [[otherbook:1032]<i>The Swinburne Letters</i>], V, 231; birth and death registers;  listed at 24 Cramer Terrace, Gateshead on Tyne, in 1891 census]

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 9th [1887]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
